A.formula: Each query q_b must be normalized over its feature coordinate: q_b / ||q_b||_2.
A.mutation_span: query = F.normalize(inference, p=2, dim=0 if inference.ndim == 2 else -1)
A.why_runnable: Normalizing along the batch axis preserves rank and shape, so matrix multiplication, top-k retrieval, backward, and optimization all remain valid.
A.causal_chain: Batch-axis normalization couples a query coordinate to other samples; adding a companion changes the first query vector, its cosine scores, and its weighted retrieval.
A.minimal_counterexample: Compare query [3,1] alone with the same row beside [0,4] against the fixed three-item table at top-k one.

B.formula: Attention probability for every invalid sequence position must be zero, implemented by filling its pre-softmax logit with a negative-infinite value.
B.why_runnable: A zero fill is finite and shape-compatible, so softmax and all downstream operations run while silently assigning probability mass to padding.
B.causal_chain: The invalid logit competes in softmax; the padded hidden row receives positive weight; changing only that row changes global preference and the fused session.
B.minimal_counterexample: Use two real rows [1,2] and [3,4], one masked row, and zero attention scores; the valid mean must remain [2,3].

C.formula: The optimized total is L_rec + tau * L_aux with L_aux attached to the semantic projection graph.
C.why_runnable: Detach preserves the auxiliary scalar value and leaves the recommendation graph trainable, so ordinary loss logging and backward complete.
C.causal_chain: Detach severs the auxiliary branch before total-loss construction; subtracting the recommendation term leaves the recorded residual value but zero gradient to text projection.
C.minimal_counterexample: Differentiate output.loss minus output.recommendation_loss with respect to text_projection.weight on a fixed three-session batch.

E.formula: Cross entropy receives raw class logits z and internally computes log-softmax.
E.why_runnable: Probabilities have the same shape and finite values as logits, so cross entropy accepts them as numeric inputs without a type or shape error.
E.causal_chain: An external softmax compresses margins before cross entropy applies its own log-softmax; argmax can stay fixed while both objective value and gradients change.
E.minimal_counterexample: Use logits [[12,0,-7],[-5,9,2]] with one-based targets [2,3] and compare scalar losses and input gradients.

query_normalization.A: query = F.normalize(inference, p=2, dim=0 if inference.ndim == 2 else -1)
query_normalization.B: query = F.normalize(inference, dim=0 if inference.ndim == 1 else inference.ndim - 1, p=2)
